profiling.title: Building your profile
profiling.leadDesktop: Your wiki lives in your vault on this Mac—private to this device, not uploaded, and not available on the web. We use mail stored here to draft a short profile into your local notes.
profiling.leadHosted: We're building your profile by learning from your emails. This will take a few moments.

wikiBuildout.title: Setting up your wiki
wikiBuildout.leadDesktop: We're creating pages from your profile and mail. Your wiki stays in your vault on this Mac only—not uploaded and not reachable from elsewhere.
wikiBuildout.leadHosted: We're creating pages from your profile and mail. Your wiki lives in your vault so the assistant can stay aligned with you.

enronDemo.title: Test accounts: Enron
enronDemo.instructions: Pick a mailbox then enter the shared demo password you were given. Data comes from the public Enron email dataset (roughly 1998–2001). For background, see Carnegie Mellon’s Enron email dataset.

handleStep.title: Choose your handle
handleStep.lead: This is how other Braintunnel users will find and connect with you. Your account has a stable id behind the scenes, so changing this handle later will be possible when we ship that flow.

errors.loadWorkspaceHandle: Could not load your workspace handle. Try reloading the page.
errors.handleTaken: That handle is taken. Try another.
errors.couldNotValidate: Could not validate handle. Try again.

lead.beforeVault: Your wiki is linked pages in
lead.afterVault: They give Braintunnel lasting context—people, projects, and what you've already written—so you don't start from zero every chat.

tips.askForSuffix: for a person, project, or idea.
tips.researchStrong: "Research this and add it to the wiki,"
tips.researchSuffix: then edit the page if you like.

dwell.waiting: A few more seconds to let the first pages land…
dwell.ready: You can continue whenever you're ready.

hostedSignIn.title: Sign in
hostedSignIn.lead: Sign in with Google to open Braintunnel.

lead.beforeStrong: macOS needs this permission so Braintunnel can read Mail, Messages, and your files on this Mac—what makes the assistant personal to you.
lead.strong: That information stays on your Mac.

steps.returnAndRestart: Return here — we’ll detect the change and restart the app.

guidedSetup.continuesSuffix: . Mail may keep indexing in the background — the assistant will describe what’s indexed so far.

multiTenant.title: Your assistant
multiTenant.leadPrefix: Braintunnel is your assistant for chat, email, and your notes—personalized to you.

appleAvailable.afterStrong: to connect mail and calendar—then add folders later to enrich.

googleOnly.afterStrong: to connect mail and calendar—then add folders later to enrich.

lead.beforeStrong: Braintunnel is your local assistant for chat, email, and your notes—personalized to you.
lead.strong: Mail, Messages, and your files stay on this Mac
lead.afterStrongSuffix: to seed mail and calendar—then add folders later to enrich.

lead.beforeStrong: Braintunnel is your assistant for chat, email, and your notes—personalized to you. Connect
lead.afterStrong: to seed mail and calendar—then add folders later to enrich.

googleOauthWait.copyPrefix: A browser window should open for Google sign-in (passkeys and 2FA work there). When you are done, return to Braintunnel; we will continue automatically. If the tab did not open, use
googleOauthWait.localSafariWarningSuffix: , that is your local Braintunnel server over HTTPS.

providerNotes.appleDesktop: On Apple, Braintunnel indexes Mail from your library and registers your Mac calendars (same source as Calendar.app) for sync. Full Disk Access lets Braintunnel read Mail, Messages, and paths you choose.
providerNotes.googleTauri: The Braintunnel app opens Google in your default browser for sign-in (mail + calendar read).
providerNotes.googleBrowser: Google sign-in uses this browser (mail + calendar read).
providerNotes.applePermissions: macOS may prompt for permissions during setup.

indexing.title: Getting to Know You.

lead.google: We’re downloading your Gmail into Braintunnel so we can build your profile. Hang tight.
lead.apple: We’re copying your messages from Apple Mail into Braintunnel so we can build your profile. Hang tight.
lead.generic: We’re connecting Braintunnel to your email so we can build your profile. Hang tight.

aria.readyToContinue_one: {{count}} message indexed — ready to continue when this screen advances
aria.readyToContinue_other: {{count}} messages indexed — ready to continue when this screen advances

indexing.backfillContinues: Initial mail sync continues in the background — it won’t block moving forward.

staleLock.stoppedUnexpectedly: A previous mail sync stopped unexpectedly.

errors.saveProgressTimeout: Could not save onboarding progress ({{seconds}}s timeout). Check the app is responding, then try again.
errors.googleSignInTakingLong: Sign-in is taking a long time. Use "Open again" or finish sign-in in your browser, then return here.
